characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, light brown complexion. Dark hair tied back with loose strands framing her face. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey or black long-sleeved button-up shirt.
characters.demeanor: Engaged, slightly hesitant at first, then enthusiastic and convinced.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Young appearance, fair complexion, bright red hair styled in a bob. Large, expressive eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Uh, थोड़ा-थोड़ा। [Uh, a little bit.]
Character B says: Can you at least say your name? [Can you at least say your name?]
Character A says: My name is Jenny. [My name is Jenny.]
Character B says: Nice. Where are you from? [Nice. Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am India. [I am India.]
Character B says: You said I am India. Close though! Try: I am from India. [You said I am India. Close though! Try: I am from India.]
Character A says: Okay, I am from India. I am India... no... wait, I am from India. [Okay, I am from India. I am India... no... wait, I am from India.]
Character B says: There you go! [There you go!]
Character A says: Hey, मेरी English कैसे improve होगी? [Hey, how will my English improve?]
Character B says: Daily conversation practice is a must. [Daily conversation practice is a must.]
Character A says: But मेरी टूटी-फूटी English के साथ कौन बात करेगा? [But who will talk to me with my broken English?]
Character B says: With me, of course! [With me, of course!]
Character A says: With you? [With you?]
Character B says: Haven't you heard of Supernova's AI English teachers? You can make as many mistakes as you want without boring anyone. [Haven't you heard of Supernova's AI English teachers? You can make as many mistakes as you want without boring anyone.]
Character A says: Wait, that could actually work. You just taught me something in two seconds. [Wait, that could actually work. You just taught me something in two seconds.]
Character B says: Download Supernova and see the difference. [Download Supernova and see the difference.]
Character A says: Oh, you know what, fair enough. I'm downloading Supernova right now! Let's go. [Oh, you know what, fair enough. I'm downloading Supernova right now! Let's go.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Establishes the learner's hesitation and current English level.
- Problem: The learner wants to practice but feels embarrassed by their mistakes.
- Solution: Introduces the AI tutor as a safe, non-judgmental practice partner.
- Payoff: The learner realizes the immediate value and decides to download the app.

Can you at least say your name?

You said "I am India." close though! Try: "I am from India."

Download Supernova and see the difference.
You know what, fair enough. I'm downloading Supernova right now! Let's go.

- Displays the app logo and download badges.
- Provides a clear call to action for the viewer.
